_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: NRG-1β effects on SAPK/JNK phosphorylation were biphasic, with an initial decrease in phosphorylation seen at 15 minutes and a subsequent rebound in phosphorylation that peaked 1 hour post-stimulation
details: Successfully detected biphasic NRG-1β effects on SAPK/JNK phosphorylation with initial decrease at 15 minutes and rebound peaking at 1 hour
